form.label: Saved Search Review
form.description: Multi-section review workflow for any Splunk saved search. Reads from /servicesNS/-/search/saved/searches; change the namespace to widen or narrow the search scope.

search.query: | makeresults | eval reviewer="$env:user$" | eval reviewer=if(isnull(reviewer) OR reviewer="" OR reviewer="$"."env:user"."$", "unknown_reviewer", reviewer) | table reviewer

| rest splunk_server=local /servicesNS/-/search/saved/searches | eval app='eai:acl.app' | eval owner='eai:acl.owner' | eval sharing='eai:acl.sharing' | eval read_perms=mvjoin('eai:acl.perms.read', ", ") | eval write_perms=mvjoin('eai:acl.perms.write', ", ") | eval modifiable='eai:acl.modifiable' | eval enabled_actions=mvjoin(actions, ", ") | eval has_email=if(match(enabled_actions, "(^|,\s*)email(,|$)"), "Yes", "No") | eval has_summary_index=if(match(enabled_actions, "(^|,\s*)summary_index(,|$)"), "Yes", "No") | eval has_lookup=if(match(enabled_actions, "(^|,\s*)lookup(,|$)"), "Yes", "No") | eval has_script=if(match(enabled_actions, "(^|,\s*)script(,|$)"), "Yes", "No") | eval has_webhook=if(match(enabled_actions, "(^|,\s*)webhook(,|$)"), "Yes", "No") | eval has_notable=if(match(enabled_actions, "(^|,\s*)notable(,|$)"), "Yes", "No") | eval has_risk=if(match(enabled_actions, "(^|,\s*)risk(,|$)"), "Yes", "No") | eval annotations_json=coalesce('action.correlationsearch.annotations', annotations, "") | rex field=annotations_json max_match=0 "(?<mitre_technique_id>T[0-9]{4}(?:\.[0-9]{3})?)" | eval mitre_technique_id=if(mvcount(mitre_technique_id)>0, mvdedup(mitre_technique_id), null()) | eval search_safe_name=lower(replace(title, "[^a-zA-Z0-9]+", "-")) | table title app owner sharing description search disabled is_scheduled cron_schedule dispatch.earliest_time dispatch.latest_time schedule_window alert_type alert_condition alert.suppress enabled_actions has_email has_summary_index has_lookup has_script has_webhook has_notable has_risk annotations_json mitre_technique_id read_perms write_perms modifiable search_safe_name | sort title
| eval display_title=title." [".app."]" | table title display_title | sort display_title

input.label: Reviewer ID (auto-filled from your Splunk username; editable)

search.query: | search title="$ss_name_tok$" | table title search_safe_name app
| search title="$ss_name_tok$" | table title app owner description disabled is_scheduled cron_schedule dispatch.earliest_time dispatch.latest_time alert_type

| search title="$ss_name_tok$" | eval title_length=len(title) | eval title_status=case( title_length < 5, "Review required: title is very short", title_length > 100, "Review required: title is very long", true(), "Pass" ) | eval description_length=if(isnull(description) OR description="", 0, len(description)) | eval description_status=case( description_length=0, "Review required: description is empty", description_length < 20, "Review required: description is very short", true(), "Pass" ) | table title title_length title_status description description_length description_status

| makeresults | eval options="$ss_safe_name_tok$_naming_$reviewer_id_tok$", order="", question="Form Name", type="form_name", description="" | table options order question type description | append [ | makeresults | eval options="form_responses", order="", question="Output Lookup", type="form_kv_output", description="" | table options order question type description ] | append [ | inputlookup review_naming.csv ]

html.p: Document what this search is intended to do and any known scope or limitation.

search.query: | makeresults | eval options="$ss_safe_name_tok$_intent_$reviewer_id_tok$", order="", question="Form Name", type="form_name", description="" | table options order question type description | append [ | makeresults | eval options="form_responses", order="", question="Output Lookup", type="form_kv_output", description="" | table options order question type description ] | append [ | inputlookup review_intent.csv ]

html.p: Technique IDs extracted from the search's annotations. Empty for non-security searches.

search.query: | search title="$ss_name_tok$" | eval mitre_technique_id=if(isnull(mitre_technique_id) OR mvcount(mitre_technique_id)=0, "(no MITRE annotations found)", mitre_technique_id) | table title mitre_technique_id annotations_json

| makeresults | eval options="$ss_safe_name_tok$_mitre_$reviewer_id_tok$", order="", question="Form Name", type="form_name", description="" | table options order question type description | append [ | makeresults | eval options="form_responses", order="", question="Output Lookup", type="form_kv_output", description="" | table options order question type description ] | append [ | inputlookup review_mitre.csv ]

| search title="$ss_name_tok$" | eval enabled_actions=if(isnull(enabled_actions) OR enabled_actions="", "(none)", enabled_actions) | table title enabled_actions has_email has_summary_index has_lookup has_script has_webhook has_notable has_risk alert_type alert_condition alert.suppress

| makeresults | eval options="$ss_safe_name_tok$_actions_$reviewer_id_tok$", order="", question="Form Name", type="form_name", description="" | table options order question type description | append [ | makeresults | eval options="form_responses", order="", question="Output Lookup", type="form_kv_output", description="" | table options order question type description ] | append [ | inputlookup review_actions.csv ]

| search title="$ss_name_tok$" | eval question="Selected saved search SPL" | eval type="spl_display" | eval options=search | eval order=2 | eval description="Read-only reference from the saved search definition. The block below is rendered with `type=spl_display` and auto-formatted by Form Viz." | table options order question type description | appendpipe [ head 1 | eval options="" | eval order=1 | eval question="## SPL Review References
Use this section to inspect command order, expensive operations, filtering, lookup/macro dependencies, and time-window assumptions.

- Prefer early filtering before heavy transforms
- Validate lookup, macro, data model, and index dependencies
- Document any proposed rewrite in the review form below" | eval type="markdown" | eval description="" | table options order question type description ] | sort order

| makeresults | eval options="$ss_safe_name_tok$_logic_$reviewer_id_tok$", order="", question="Form Name", type="form_name", description="" | table options order question type description | append [ | makeresults | eval options="form_responses", order="", question="Output Lookup", type="form_kv_output", description="" | table options order question type description ] | append [ | inputlookup review_logic.csv ]

| search title="$ss_name_tok$" | eval is_scheduled=if(is_scheduled=1 OR is_scheduled="1" OR is_scheduled="true", "Yes", "No") | table title is_scheduled cron_schedule dispatch.earliest_time dispatch.latest_time schedule_window

index=_internal sourcetype=scheduler savedsearch_name="$ss_name_tok$" | stats count AS total_runs sum(eval(if(status="success", 1, 0))) AS successful sum(eval(if(status="skipped", 1, 0))) AS skipped sum(eval(if(status="continued", 1, 0))) AS continued avg(run_time) AS avg_runtime_s max(run_time) AS max_runtime_s BY savedsearch_name | eval avg_runtime_s=round(avg_runtime_s, 2) | eval max_runtime_s=round(max_runtime_s, 2) | eval skip_pct=if(total_runs>0, round(skipped*100.0/total_runs, 1), 0) | rename savedsearch_name AS title | table title total_runs successful skipped skip_pct continued avg_runtime_s max_runtime_s

| makeresults | eval options="$ss_safe_name_tok$_schedule_$reviewer_id_tok$", order="", question="Form Name", type="form_name", description="" | table options order question type description | append [ | makeresults | eval options="form_responses", order="", question="Output Lookup", type="form_kv_output", description="" | table options order question type description ] | append [ | inputlookup review_schedule.csv ]
| search title="$ss_name_tok$" | table title app owner sharing read_perms write_perms modifiable

| makeresults | eval options="$ss_safe_name_tok$_permissions_$reviewer_id_tok$", order="", question="Form Name", type="form_name", description="" | table options order question type description | append [ | makeresults | eval options="form_responses", order="", question="Output Lookup", type="form_kv_output", description="" | table options order question type description ] | append [ | inputlookup review_permissions.csv ]

html.p: Review the test plan and whether the search can be triggered as documented.

search.query: | makeresults | eval options="$ss_safe_name_tok$_test_$reviewer_id_tok$", order="", question="Form Name", type="form_name", description="" | table options order question type description | append [ | makeresults | eval options="form_responses", order="", question="Output Lookup", type="form_kv_output", description="" | table options order question type description ] | append [ | inputlookup review_test.csv ]

html.p: Document any recommendations for tuning, retirement, ownership change, or further work.

search.query: | makeresults | eval options="$ss_safe_name_tok$_nextsteps_$reviewer_id_tok$", order="", question="Form Name", type="form_name", description="" | table options order question type description | append [ | makeresults | eval options="form_responses", order="", question="Output Lookup", type="form_kv_output", description="" | table options order question type description ] | append [ | inputlookup review_nextsteps.csv ]

html.p: Indexes, data models, macros and lookups parsed from the search's SPL. Confirm each dependency exists in this environment.

search.query: | search title="$ss_name_tok$" | rex field=search max_match=0 "(?i)index\s*=\s*\"?(?<idx>[\w\-*]+)" | rex field=search max_match=0 "`(?<macro>[^`]+)`" | rex field=search max_match=0 "(?i)\b(?:input)?lookup\s+(?<lk>[\w\-]+)" | eval indexes=if(mvcount(idx)>0, mvjoin(mvdedup(idx), ", "), "(none detected)") | eval index_count=if(mvcount(idx)>0, mvcount(mvdedup(idx)), 0) | eval uses_datamodel=if(match(search, "(?i)\|\s*tstats|datamodel"), "Yes", "No") | eval macros=if(mvcount(macro)>0, mvjoin(mvdedup(macro), ", "), "(none)") | eval lookups=if(mvcount(lk)>0, mvjoin(mvdedup(lk), ", "), "(none)") | table title indexes index_count uses_datamodel macros lookups

| makeresults | eval options="$ss_safe_name_tok$_datasource_$reviewer_id_tok$", order="", question="Form Name", type="form_name", description="" | table options order question type description | append [ | makeresults | eval options="form_responses", order="", question="Output Lookup", type="form_kv_output", description="" | table options order question type description ] | append [ | inputlookup review_datasource.csv ]

html.p: Recent scheduler firing history (last 30 days) for this search. Confirm the trigger volume matches expectations.

search.query: index=_internal sourcetype=scheduler savedsearch_name="$ss_name_tok$" | stats count AS runs_30d sum(eval(if(status="success", 1, 0))) AS successful sum(eval(if(status="skipped", 1, 0))) AS skipped sum(eval(if(status="continued", 1, 0))) AS continued latest(_time) AS last_fired_epoch sum(result_count) AS total_results BY savedsearch_name | appendpipe [ stats count AS row_count | where row_count=0 | eval savedsearch_name="$ss_name_tok$" | eval runs_30d=0 | eval successful=0 | eval skipped=0 | eval continued=0 | eval total_results=0 ] | eval last_fired=if(isnull(last_fired_epoch), "(never in window)", strftime(last_fired_epoch, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")) | eval avg_results_per_run=if(runs_30d>0, round(total_results/runs_30d, 1), 0) | rename savedsearch_name AS title | table title runs_30d successful skipped continued last_fired total_results avg_results_per_run

| makeresults | eval options="$ss_safe_name_tok$_triggers_$reviewer_id_tok$", order="", question="Form Name", type="form_name", description="" | table options order question type description | append [ | makeresults | eval options="form_responses", order="", question="Output Lookup", type="form_kv_output", description="" | table options order question type description ] | append [ | inputlookup review_triggers.csv ]

html.p: Latest response per question for each review section. Form names are keyed as <safe-search-name>_<section>_<reviewer>.

search.query:
| inputlookup form_responses | rex field=form_name "^(?<ss_safe_name>.+?)_(?<section>naming|intent|mitre|actions|logic|schedule|permissions|test|nextsteps|datasource|triggers)_(?<analyst>.+)$" | search ss_safe_name="$ss_safe_name_tok$"
| eval section_order=case( section="naming", 1, section="intent", 2, section="mitre", 3, section="actions", 4, section="logic", 5, section="schedule", 6, section="permissions", 7, section="test", 8, section="nextsteps", 9, section="datasource", 10, section="triggers", 11, true(), 99 )
| eval section_display=case( section="naming", "1. Naming and Description Review", section="intent", "2. Intent Review", section="mitre", "3. MITRE ATT&CK Review", section="actions", "4. Actions Review", section="logic", "5. Search Logic Review", section="schedule", "6. Schedule and Performance Review", section="permissions", "7. Permissions Review", section="test", "8. Test Review", section="nextsteps", "9. Next Steps", section="datasource", "10. Data Sources and Dependencies Review", section="triggers", "11. Trigger Activity Review", true(), section )
| where section_order < 99
| eventstats max(_time) AS latest_section_response_epoch BY ss_safe_name section | where _time=latest_section_response_epoch
| eval latest_response_time=strftime(latest_section_response_epoch, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | eval order=tonumber(order)
| sort 0 section_order order question
| table section_display order question answer analyst user latest_response_time submission_id form_name
